differential_diagnoses: Kaposi's varicelliform eruption (eczema herpeticum) superinfected with Pseudomonas
Drug reaction with eosinophilia and systemic symptoms (DRESS)
Paraneoplastic erythroderma secondary to lung malignancy
next_steps: Perform repeat deep punch biopsies or excisional lymph node biopsy for flow cytometry, immunohistochemistry (CD3, CD4, CD8, CD7, CD30), and T-cell receptor gene rearrangement studies
Obtain peripheral blood flow cytometry for Sézary cell quantification
Obtain biopsy of the pulmonary mass via CT-guided core needle biopsy or bronchoscopy
Review systemic medication list for potential DRESS-inducing agents
Continue targeted antimicrobial therapy for Pseudomonas aeruginosa and HSV based on culture and PCR results
Consult hematology/oncology and dermatology for multidisciplinary management
